page.t: WARNING: Pressing '{1001, 2821}' will immediately salvage the selected ship which is irreversible.
%s(station name) \(%s(station ID code)\) salvaged ship %s(ship name) \(%s(ship ID code)\).\n
The following wares were salvaged:\n%1(ware list)\n
A total of \033G%s(total value)\033XCr was salvaged.\n
The following inventory items were salvaged:\n%s(inventory list)\n
\033B%s(ware name)\033X x\033C%s(ware amount)\033X out of \033C%s(total ware amount)\033X \(\033G%s(added credits)\033XCr added\)\n
No bluepint found, %.0f%% credit value salvaged
